data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Test endpoint functionality', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for testing endpoint functionality, yet there are no specific details or examples demonstrating that this requirement has been fulfilled. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to support the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of the test endpoint.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint functionality tests
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the test endpoint responds correctly to various inputs.
